$description: JD V16 受控词表。validate.sh / Step 3 推断 / Step 8 写 frontmatter 都查本表。任何字段值不在列就算 ⚠️ fallback。

level.$note: auto-detect 启发:Relay 节点根 frame name 含 '页面'/'流程' → page/flow;否则 component-*

bg.$note: horizontal = 通用横向(component-base / component-business);其余 7 个是 8 大 BG(零售/健康/金融/物流/海外/京喜/工业)

status.$note: 新建默认 draft;5 处 TODO 全填后才能改 review;design 评审过才能改 published

design_dept.$description: V16 13 个业务设计部门,L3 page 录入时必填。真相源:V15 jd-design-system-md/product-architecture/README.md(2026-05-25 落定 13 部门英文 slug,issue #79)
design_dept.$migration_note: 2026-05-28 follow-up PR 把 V16 design_dept slug 从技术 BG 维度切到 V15 业务设计部门维度,跟 V15 README authoritative 对齐,解决 PR #128 review 中 brand-and-marketing slug 不在 controlled-vocab 的漂移。旧 13 个技术 BG 维度 slug(comprehensive-business / platform-trade / huangliu-shopping-guide / smart-supply / intelligent-marketing / international / infrastructure / retail-tech / logistics-tech / health-tech / finance-tech / jx-special / industrial-tech)中,仅 comprehensive-business 与新表重叠,其余 12 个废弃。
design_dept.$note: 13 个业务设计部门 slug,以 sub-domain 形式呈现(product-architecture/<slug>/);中文名 ↔ slug 对照见 .claude/skills/design-md-to-spec-page/references/section-mapping.md
